-- Sync GMCP vitals; clears pending on 0->1 regain and emits wake reasons for freestyle lane isolation. function L.sync_vitals(v) v = v or (gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Vitals) or {} local eq = tostring(v.eq or v.equilibrium or "") == "1" or (v.eq == true or v.equilibrium == true) local bal = tostring(v.bal or v.balance or "") == "1" or (v.bal == true or v.balance == true)
local eq_rise = (eq == true and L._vitals.eq == false) local bal_rise = (bal == true and L._vitals.bal == false)
if eq_rise and L._lane.eq then L._lane.eq.pending_until = 0 end if bal_rise and L._lane.bal then L._lane.bal.pending_until = 0 end
L._vitals.eq, L._vitals.bal = eq, bal
if (eq_rise or bal_rise) and Yso and Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.wake) == "function" then if eq_rise then pcall(Yso.pulse.wake, "lane:eq") end if bal_rise then pcall(Yso.pulse.wake, "lane:bal") end end end
-- Mark multi-lane payload as pending; for ENTITY lane also apply timed ent_busy() if possible. function L.note_payload(payload) if type(payload) ~= "table" then return end if payload.eq then L.note_send("eq") end if payload.bal then L.note_send("bal") end
if payload.class or payload.ent or payload.entity then L.note_send("class")
local cls = payload.class or payload.ent or payload.entity local cmd if type(cls) == "string" then cmd = cls elseif type(cls) == "table" then cmd = cls[1] end
local cd, key if cmd and type(Yso.occ) == "table" and type(Yso.occ.entity_cd_for_cmd) == "function" then local ok, a, b = pcall(Yso.occ.entity_cd_for_cmd, cmd) if ok then cd, key = a, b end end
if cd and Yso.state and type(Yso.state.ent_busy) == "function" then pcall(Yso.state.ent_busy, cd, "locks:payload", key) elseif Yso.state and type(Yso.state.set_ent_ready) == "function" then pcall(Yso.state.set_ent_ready, false, "locks:payload") end end end
function L.ent_backoff(seconds, src) seconds = tonumber(seconds) or 1.0 if seconds <= 0 then seconds = 0.5 end local st = L._lane.class st.backoff_until = math.max(tonumber(st.backoff_until or 0) or 0, _now() + seconds) if Yso.state and type(Yso.state.ent_fail) == "function" then pcall(Yso.state.ent_fail, seconds, src or "locks.ent_backoff") elseif Yso.state and type(Yso.state.set_ent_ready) == "function" then pcall(Yso.state.set_ent_ready, false, src or "locks.ent_backoff") end end
function L.ready(lane) lane = tostring(lane or ""):lower() if lane == "ent" or lane == "entity" then lane = "class" end
local st = L._lane[lane] local now = _now() if st and tonumber(st.pending_until or 0) > now then return false end
if lane == "eq" then local v = nil
if Yso.state and type(Yso.state.eq_ready)=="function" then
local ok, r = pcall(Yso.state.eq_ready)
if ok and r ~= nil then v = (r == true) end
end
if v ~= nil then return v end
return true elseif lane == "bal" then local v = nil
if Yso.state and type(Yso.state.bal_ready)=="function" then
local ok, r = pcall(Yso.state.bal_ready)
if ok and r ~= nil then v = (r == true) end
end
if v ~= nil then return v end
return true elseif lane == "class" then if st and tonumber(st.backoff_until or 0) > now then return false end local v = nil
if Yso.state and type(Yso.state.ent_ready)=="function" then
local ok, r = pcall(Yso.state.ent_ready)
if ok and r ~= nil then v = (r == true) end
end
if v ~= nil then return v end
return true end return true end
function L.eq_ready() return L.ready("eq") end function L.bal_ready() return L.ready("bal") end function L.ent_ready() return L.ready("class") end end end
--========================================================-- --========================================================-- -- Yso.fnref (static full index + runtime walker) -- • static: comprehensive "Yso.oc.ak.scores.kelp", "Yso.oc.ak.scores.mental", "Yso.oc.ak.scores.trample", "Yso.oc.ak.scores.whisper", "Yso.oc.cures.affs_in_eat_bucket", "Yso.oc.cures.bucket_score", "Yso.oc.cures.dump", "Yso.oc.cures.get", "Yso.oc.cures.ginseng_score", "Yso.oc.cures.golden_score", "Yso.oc.cures.kelp_score", "Yso.oc.cures.rebuild", "Yso.predict.cure.dump", "Yso.predict.cure.next", "Yso.predict.cure.observe", "Yso.predict.toggle", "Yso.predict.wire", "Yso.oc.map.rebuild_by_aff", "Yso.oc.prone.softscore", "Yso.oc.prone.step", "Yso.oc.prone.try_hook", "Yso.oc.prone.want_anorexia", }, misc_pacts = { "Yso.pacts.begin_capture", "Yso.pacts.finish_capture", "Yso.pacts.get_low", "Yso.pacts.get_missing", "Yso.pacts.parse_line", "Yso.pacts.report_alerts", "Yso.pacts.report_low", }, misc_priestess = { "Yso.priestess.on_vitals", "Yso.priestess.queue_self", "Yso.priestess.queue_target", "Yso.priestess.set_threshold", "Yso.priestess.toggle_auto", }, misc_primebond = { "Yso.primebond.request", }, misc_probe = { "Yso.probe.both", "Yso.probe.heartstone", "Yso.probe.simulacrum", }, misc_radianceAlert = { "Yso.radianceAlert.banner", "Yso.radianceAlert.center", "Yso.radianceAlert.fire", "Yso.radianceAlert.sound", }, misc_reload = { "Yso.reload", }, misc_resolve_target = { "Yso.resolve_target", }, misc_room_has = { "Yso.room_has", }, misc_self = { "Yso.self.has_aff", "Yso.self.is_paralyzed", }, misc_set_loyals_attack = { "Yso.set_loyals_attack", }, misc_set_mind_focused = { "Yso.set_mind_focused", }, misc_set_readaura_ready = { "Yso.set_readaura_ready", }, misc_set_soulmaster_ready = { "Yso.set_soulmaster_ready", }, misc_set_sycophant_ready = { "Yso.set_sycophant_ready", }, misc_set_target = { "Yso.set_target", "Yso.target_flush_send_state", }, misc_set_tree_ready = { "Yso.set_tree_ready", }, misc_set_tree_touched = { "Yso.set_tree_touched", }, misc_shutdown = { "Yso.shutdown", }, misc_soulmaster_ready = { "Yso.soulmaster_ready", }, misc_sycophant_ready = { "Yso.sycophant_ready", }, misc_tarot = { "Yso.tarot.devil_active", "Yso.tarot.devil_down", "Yso.tarot.devil_up", }, misc_tree_ready = { "Yso.tree_ready", }, misc_tree_touched = { "Yso.tree_touched", }, } local function _get(path) if type(path) ~= "string" then return nil end local t = _G for seg in path:gmatch("[^%.]+") do if type(t) ~= "table" then return nil end t = t[seg] if t == nil then return nil end end return t end function F.exists(path) return type(_get(path)) == "function" end function F.walk(root, prefix, out, seen) root = root or Yso prefix = prefix or "Yso" out = out or {} seen = seen or {} if type(root) ~= "table" then return out end if seen[root] then return out end seen[root] = true for k,v in pairs(root) do local key = tostring(k) if key:sub(1,1) ~= "_" then local p = prefix .. "." .. key if type(v) == "function" then out[#out+1] = p elseif type(v) == "table" and key ~= "fnref" then F.walk(v, p, out, seen) end end end table.sort(out) return out end local function _echo(s) if type(cecho) == "function" then cecho(s.."\n") else echo(s.."\n") end end function F.echo_static(cat) if not cat or cat == "" then local keys = {} for k,_ in pairs(F.static or {}) do keys[#keys+1] = k end table.sort(keys) _echo("<dim_grey>[Yso.fnref] categories: "..table.concat(keys, ", ").."<reset>") return keys end local lst = (F.static and F.static[cat]) or {} _echo(string.format("<dim_grey>[Yso.fnref] %s: %d<reset>", tostring(cat), #lst)) for i=1,#lst do local p = lst[i] local ok = (F.exists(p) and "<green>✓<reset>" or "<red>✗<reset>") _echo("<dim_grey> "..ok.." "..p.."<reset>") end return lst end function F.echo_runtime(n) n = tonumber(n) or 60 local lst = F.walk() _echo("<dim_grey>[Yso.fnref] runtime functions: "..tostring(#lst).."<reset>") for i=1, math.min(n, #lst) do _echo("<dim_grey> "..lst[i].."<reset>") end return lst end end

Script.name: Yso_Offense_Coordination.lua
Script.script:
--========================================================-- -- Yso_Offense_Coordination.lua -- • Compatibility shim for older aliases/debug surfaces. -- • Authoritative alias-loop ownership now lives in Yso.mode. -- • Target auto-clear and enemy cure telemetry still live here. --========================================================--
Yso = Yso or {} Yso.off = Yso.off or {} Yso.off.oc = Yso.off.oc or {}
local function _off_core() local core = Yso and Yso.off and Yso.off.core or nil if core and type(core.toggle) == "function" then return core end if type(require) == "function" then pcall(require, "Yso.Combat.offense_core") end core = Yso and Yso.off and Yso.off.core or nil if core and type(core.toggle) == "function" then return core end return nil end
function Yso.off.oc.toggle(on) local core = _off_core() if core then if on == nil then return core.toggle("oc_aff") elseif on == true then return core.on("oc_aff") end return core.off("oc_aff") end
if on == nil then Yso.off.oc.enabled = not (Yso.off.oc.enabled == true) else Yso.off.oc.enabled = (on == true) end if Yso and Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.wake) == "function" then Yso.pulse.wake("oc:toggle") end local msg = string.format("<orange>[Yso] Occultist offense %s.", Yso.off.oc.enabled and "ON" or "OFF") if Yso.util and type(Yso.util.cecho_line) == "function" then Yso.util.cecho_line(msg) else cecho(msg .. "\n") end end
Yso.off.coord = Yso.off.coord or {} local C = Yso.off.coord
C.cfg = C.cfg or {} C.cfg.lust_empress_automation = false C.cfg.pause_on_leap_out = true
C._ev = C._ev or {} C._tr = C._tr or {} C._st = C._st or { tumble_react = { last = {} }, dead = { pending = "", at = 0 } }
local function _pkill(fn, id) if id then pcall(fn, id) end end local function _trim(s) return (tostring(s or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","")) end local function _lc(s) return _trim(s):lower() end
local function _now() if Yso and Yso.util and type(Yso.util.now) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(Yso.util.now) if ok and tonumber(v) then return tonumber(v) end end if type(getEpoch) == "function" then local t = tonumber(getEpoch()) or os.time() if t > 20000000000 then t = t / 1000 end return t end return os.time() end
local function _hotpink(msg) if type(cecho) == "function" then local text = string.format("<HotPink>[OFFENSE:] %s", msg) if Yso.util and type(Yso.util.cecho_line) == "function" then Yso.util.cecho_line(text) else cecho(text .. "\n") end else echo(string.format("[OFFENSE:] %s\n", msg)) end end
local function _cur_target() if type(Yso.get_target) == "function" then return _trim(Yso.get_target() or "") end return _trim((type(Yso.target) == "string" and Yso.target) or (Yso.state and type(Yso.state.target) == "string" and Yso.state.target) or "") end
local function _is_current(t) return _lc(_cur_target()) == _lc(t) end
local function _clear(reason) if type(Yso.clear_target) == "function" then Yso.clear_target(reason or "auto") end end
C._tm = C._tm or {} C._st.dead = C._st.dead or { pending = "", at = 0 }
local function _cancel_dead_clear() if C._tm.dead_clear then pcall(killTimer, C._tm.dead_clear) end C._tm.dead_clear = nil C._st.dead.pending = "" C._st.dead.at = 0 end
local function _reset_enemy_state_on_starburst(tgt) if type(affstrack) == "table" then if type(affstrack.score) == "table" then for k, v in pairs(affstrack.score) do if type(v) == "number" then affstrack.score[k] = 0 elseif type(v) == "table" then if type(v.current) == "number" then v.current = 0 end if type(v.score) == "number" then v.score = 0 end end end else for _, v in pairs(affstrack) do if type(v) == "table" and type(v.score) == "number" then v.score = 0 end end end end
if type(oscore) == "number" then oscore = 0 end if type(softscore) == "number" then softscore = 0 end
if Yso and Yso.tgt and type(Yso.tgt.set_mindseye) == "function" then pcall(Yso.tgt.set_mindseye, tgt, false, true) end end
local function _schedule_dead_clear(tgt) tgt = _trim(tgt) if tgt == "" then return end
_cancel_dead_clear() C._st.dead.pending = tgt C._st.dead.at = _now()
if type(tempTimer) ~= "function" then local pend = C._st.dead.pending C._tm.dead_clear = nil C._st.dead.pending = "" C._st.dead.at = 0 if pend ~= "" and _is_current(pend) then _clear("dead") end return end
local my_id my_id = tempTimer(2.2, function() if C._tm.dead_clear ~= my_id then return end local pend = C._st.dead.pending C._tm.dead_clear = nil C._st.dead.pending = "" C._st.dead.at = 0 if pend ~= "" and _is_current(pend) then _clear("dead") end end) C._tm.dead_clear = my_id end
Yso.off.oc = Yso.off.oc or {} Yso.off.oc.entity_pool = Yso.off.oc.entity_pool or { rotation = { "worm", "sycophant", "bubonis", "crone", "hound", "slime", "storm", "bloodleech", "firelord", "gremlin" }, kelp = { asthma = "bubonis", clumsiness = "storm", healthleech = "worm" }, }
Yso.off.oc.cure_events = Yso.off.oc.cure_events or { kelp_eat_at = {}, kelp_eat_n = {}, aurum_eat_at = {}, aurum_eat_n = {}, tree_touch_at = {}, tree_touch_n = {}, }
Yso.off.oc.party_observe = Yso.off.oc.party_observe or { max_events = 30, rows = {}, }
local function _mark(tbl_at, tbl_n, who) who = tostring(who or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") if who == "" then return end local k = who:lower() tbl_at[k] = _now() tbl_n[k] = (tonumber(tbl_n[k] or 0) or 0) + 1 end
local function _note_target_herb(who, herb_key) if Yso and Yso.tgt and type(Yso.tgt.note_target_herb) == "function" then pcall(Yso.tgt.note_target_herb, who, herb_key) end end
local function _party_observe_note(who, event, meta) who = _trim(who) event = _trim(event) if who == "" or event == "" then return end
local O = Yso.off.oc.party_observe or {} O.rows = O.rows or {} Yso.off.oc.party_observe = O
local key = _lc(who) local row = O.rows[key] if type(row) ~= "table" then row = { name = who, count = 0, last_at = 0, last_event = "", events = {}, } O.rows[key] = row end
row.name = who row.count = tonumber(row.count or 0) + 1 row.last_at = _now() row.last_event = event row.events = row.events or {} row.events[#row.events + 1] = { at = row.last_at, event = event, meta = type(meta) == "table" and meta or {}, active_target = _is_current(who), }
local max_events = tonumber(O.max_events or 30) or 30 while #row.events > max_events do table.remove(row.events, 1) end end
function Yso.off.oc.party_observe_get(who) who = _trim(who) if who == "" then return nil end local O = Yso.off.oc.party_observe or {} return O.rows and O.rows[_lc(who)] or nil end
function Yso.off.oc.party_observe_snapshot() local O = Yso.off.oc.party_observe or {} return O.rows or {} end
function Yso.off.oc.on_enemy_kelp_eat(who) local E = Yso.off.oc.cure_events _mark(E.kelp_eat_at, E.kelp_eat_n, who) _note_target_herb(who, "kelp") _party_observe_note(who, "kelp", { bucket = "kelp" }) local core = Yso and Yso.off and Yso.off.core or nil if core and type(core.on_enemy_kelp_eat) == "function" then pcall(core.on_enemy_kelp_eat, who) end end
function Yso.off.oc.on_enemy_aurum_eat(who) local E = Yso.off.oc.cure_events _mark(E.aurum_eat_at, E.aurum_eat_n, who) _note_target_herb(who, "aurum") _party_observe_note(who, "aurum", { bucket = "aurum" }) local core = Yso and Yso.off and Yso.off.core or nil if core and type(core.on_enemy_aurum_eat) == "function" then pcall(core.on_enemy_aurum_eat, who) end end
function Yso.off.oc.on_enemy_tree_touch(who) local E = Yso.off.oc.cure_events _mark(E.tree_touch_at, E.tree_touch_n, who) _party_observe_note(who, "tree", {}) if Yso and Yso.tgt and type(Yso.tgt.get)=="function" then local ok,r = pcall(Yso.tgt.get, who) if ok and type(r)=="table" then r.meta = r.meta or {} r.meta.last_tree_touch_at = E.tree_touch_at[tostring(who or ""):lower()] end end local core = Yso and Yso.off and Yso.off.core or nil if core and type(core.on_enemy_tree_touch) == "function" then pcall(core.on_enemy_tree_touch, who) end end
function Yso.off.oc.last_kelp_eat_at(who) local k = tostring(who or ""):lower() local E = Yso.off.oc.cure_events return E and tonumber(E.kelp_eat_at and E.kelp_eat_at[k] or 0) or 0 end
Yso.off.driver = Yso.off.driver or {} local D = Yso.off.driver
D.cfg = D.cfg or { enabled = true, verbose = false, }
D.state = D.state or { enabled = (D.cfg.enabled ~= false), policy = "manual", active = "none", }
local function _v(msg) if not (D.cfg.verbose == true) then return end if type(cecho) == "function" then local text = ("<dim_grey>[Yso.driver] <reset>%s"):format(tostring(msg)) if Yso.util and type(Yso.util.cecho_line) == "function" then Yso.util.cecho_line(text) else cecho(text .. "\n") end end end
local function _mode() return Yso and Yso.mode or nil end
local function _sync_state() D.state = D.state or {} local M = _mode() local route = "" if M and type(M.active_route_id) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(M.active_route_id) if ok then route = _lc(v or "") end end
D.state.enabled = (D.cfg.enabled ~= false) D.state.active = (route ~= "" and route) or "none" D.state.policy = (route ~= "" and "auto") or "manual" return D.state end
function D.current_route() local st = _sync_state() local route = _lc(st.active or "") if route == "" or route == "none" then return nil end return route end
function D.toggle(on) local prev = (D.state.enabled == true) local next_enabled if on == nil then next_enabled = not prev else next_enabled = (on == true) end D.state.enabled = next_enabled D.cfg.enabled = next_enabled _v("enabled="..tostring(D.state.enabled)) if Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.wake) == "function" then local ok = pcall(Yso.pulse.wake, "driver:toggle") if not ok then D.state.enabled = prev D.cfg.enabled = prev _v("toggle rollback: pulse wake failed") end end return D.state.enabled end
function D.set_policy(p) p = _lc(p or "") if p ~= "" then D.state.policy = p D.cfg.policy = p end _sync_state() return D.state.policy end
function D.set_active(route) route = _lc(route or "") if route ~= "" then D.state.active = route end _sync_state() return D.state.active end
function D.tick(reasons) _sync_state() -- Delegate to off.core when available; this driver is a compat shim. local core = Yso and Yso.off and Yso.off.core or nil if core and type(core.tick) == "function" then local ok, sent = pcall(core.tick, reasons) return (ok and sent == true) end return false end
_sync_state()
if Yso and Yso.pulse and Yso.pulse.state and Yso.pulse.state.reg and Yso.pulse.state.reg["offense_driver"] then Yso.pulse.state.reg["offense_driver"].enabled = false end
return D

Script.name: Parry Module
Script.script:
-- Auto-exported from Mudlet package script: Parry Module -- DO NOT EDIT IN XML; edit this file instead.
--========================================================-- -- Yso Parry Module (class-agnostic) -- Defensive limb parrying against limb-prep classes. -- Parries the "final limb" closest to breaking for an -- enemy's kill condition. Special BM restore handling -- keeps one arm delayed so rift/salve access is preserved. -- -- PARRY is free/instant - no balance cost. --========================================================--
Yso = Yso or {} Yso.parry = Yso.parry or {} local P = Yso.parry
P.cfg = P.cfg or { enabled = true, threshold = 100, -- min self limb score before we consider standard parrying debug = false, route_debounce_s = 0.45, -- explicit debounce for free-lane routing restore_override_s = 12.0, -- safety cap if state gets desynced }
P._current = P._current or nil P._last_sent_at = tonumber(P._last_sent_at or 0) or 0 P._last_sent_limb = tostring(P._last_sent_limb or "") P._restore = P._restore or { active = false, started_at = 0, last_cured_leg = "", } P._trigs = P._trigs or {}
------------------------------------------------------------ -- Kill-condition table: which limbs each class needs ------------------------------------------------------------ P.KILL_CONDITIONS = P.KILL_CONDITIONS or { Blademaster = { primary = { "leftleg", "rightleg" }, secondary = { "leftarm", "rightarm" }, riftlock = true, }, Monk = { primary = { "leftleg", "rightleg", "head" }, }, Apostle = { primary = { "leftleg", "rightleg" }, }, }
------------------------------------------------------------ -- Limb name conversion for the PARRY command ------------------------------------------------------------ local _LIMB_CMD = { leftleg = "left leg", rightleg = "right leg", leftarm = "left arm", rightarm = "right arm", head = "head", torso = "torso", }
------------------------------------------------------------ -- Internal helpers ------------------------------------------------------------
local function _p_echo(msg) if P.cfg.debug and type(cecho) == "function" then cecho(string.format("<PaleGreen>[Parry] <reset>%s\n", tostring(msg))) end end
local function _now() if Yso and Yso.util and type(Yso.util.now) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(Yso.util.now) v = ok and tonumber(v) or nil if v then return v end end if type(getEpoch) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(getEpoch) v = ok and tonumber(v) or nil if v then if v > 1e12 then v = v / 1000 end return v end end return os.time() end
local function _self_score(limb) if not affstrack or type(affstrack.score) ~= "table" then return 0 end return tonumber(affstrack.score[limb]) or 0 end
local function _self_has_aff(aff) -- Diagnostic note (#22): parry remains Yso-self-truth first by design. -- No additional Legacy hysteresis layer is applied here unless real divergence is observed. aff = tostring(aff or ""):lower() if aff == "" then return false end
if Yso and Yso.selfaff and type(Yso.selfaff.normalize) == "function" then aff = Yso.selfaff.normalize(aff) end
if Yso and Yso.self and type(Yso.self.has_aff) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(Yso.self.has_aff, aff) if ok and v == true then return true end end
if Yso and type(Yso.affs) == "table" and Yso.affs[aff] then return true end
local g = gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Afflictions if type(g) == "table" then if g[aff] == true then return true end local lists = { g.List, g.list, g.Afflictions, g.afflictions } for i = 1, #lists do local lst = lists[i] if type(lst) == "table" then for j = 1, #lst do local item = lst[j] local name = type(item) == "table" and item.name or item if tostring(name or ""):lower() == aff then return true end end end end end
return false end
local function _self_standing() if Yso and Yso.self and type(Yso.self.is_standing) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(Yso.self.is_standing) if ok then return v == true end end local v = (gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Vitals) or {} local posture = tostring(v.position or v.posture or v.pose or v.state or ""):lower() if posture ~= "" then if posture:find("stand", 1, true) then return true end if posture:find("prone", 1, true) or posture:find("supine", 1, true) or posture:find("kneel", 1, true) or posture:find("sit", 1, true) or posture:find("sleep", 1, true) then return false end end return not (_self_has_aff("prone") or _self_has_aff("sleeping") or _self_has_aff("fallen")) end
local function _enemy_class() local cur_target = rawget(_G, "target") if Legacy and Legacy.CT and Legacy.CT.Enemies and type(cur_target) == "string" and cur_target ~= "" then return Legacy.CT.Enemies[cur_target] end return nil end
local function _current_cureset() local prof = Yso and Yso.curing and Yso.curing._active_profile or nil if type(prof) == "string" and prof ~= "" then return prof:lower() end local cur = rawget(_G, "CurrentCureset") if type(cur) == "string" and cur ~= "" then return cur:lower() end return "" end
local function _find_highest_unbroken(limbs) local best_limb, best_score = nil, -1 for _, limb in ipairs(limbs) do local s = _self_score(limb) if s < 300 and s > best_score then best_limb = limb best_score = s end end return best_limb, best_score end
local function _bm_restore_context() if _current_cureset() == "blademaster" then return true end return _enemy_class() == "Blademaster" end
local function _arm_candidate_for_restore() local la = _self_score("leftarm") local ra = _self_score("rightarm") local left_ok = la < 300 local right_ok = ra < 300 if not left_ok and not right_ok then return nil end if left_ok and not right_ok then return "leftarm", la end if right_ok and not left_ok then return "rightarm", ra end if la == ra then return ((math.random(2) == 1) and "leftarm" or "rightarm"), la end if la < ra then return "leftarm", la end return "rightarm", ra end
local function _restore_finished() -- Prefer tracker truth, but keep a score-key fallback for harnesses / partial -- integrations that only provide damaged-leg score entries. local left_damaged = _self_has_aff("damagedleftleg") or (_self_score("damagedleftleg") > 0) local right_damaged = _self_has_aff("damagedrightleg") or (_self_score("damagedrightleg") > 0) return (not left_damaged) and (not right_damaged) and _self_standing() end
function P.note_leg_restored(aff) aff = tostring(aff or ""):lower() if aff ~= "damagedleftleg" and aff ~= "damagedrightleg" then return false end if not _bm_restore_context() then return false end P._restore = P._restore or {} P._restore.active = true P._restore.started_at = _now() P._restore.last_cured_leg = aff _p_echo("BM restore override armed via " .. aff) return true end
function P.clear_restore(reason) if P._restore then P._restore.active = false P._restore.started_at = 0 P._restore.last_cured_leg = "" end if reason then _p_echo("restore override cleared: " .. tostring(reason)) end end
local function _restore_override_candidate() local R = P._restore or {} if R.active ~= true then return nil end if not _bm_restore_context() then P.clear_restore("context") return nil end if _restore_finished() then P.clear_restore("legs_clean_and_standing") return nil end local cap = tonumber(P.cfg.restore_override_s or 12.0) or 12.0 if cap > 0 and (_now() - tonumber(R.started_at or 0)) > cap then P.clear_restore("safety_timeout") return nil end local limb, score = _arm_candidate_for_restore() if not limb then return nil end return limb, tonumber(score) or 0, "bm_restore_override" end
------------------------------------------------------------ -- Core evaluation ------------------------------------------------------------
function P.evaluate() if not P.cfg.enabled then return nil end if not (Yso.toggles and Yso.toggles.parry) then return nil end
local override_limb, override_score, override_reason = _restore_override_candidate() if override_limb then return override_limb, override_score, override_reason end
local class = _enemy_class() if not class then return nil end
local kc = P.KILL_CONDITIONS[class] if not kc then return nil end
local candidate, candidate_score = nil, -1
-- BM riftlock special case: if both arms being prepped, -- always parry the arm with higher damage to delay rift denial. if kc.riftlock then local la = _self_score("leftarm") local ra = _self_score("rightarm") if la >= P.cfg.threshold and ra >= P.cfg.threshold then if la >= ra and la < 300 then candidate, candidate_score = "leftarm", la elseif ra < 300 then candidate, candidate_score = "rightarm", ra end end end
-- Check primary kill-condition limbs first, but still let the highest-score -- qualifying limb win overall. if not candidate then local limb, score = _find_highest_unbroken(kc.primary or {}) if limb and score >= P.cfg.threshold and score > candidate_score then candidate, candidate_score = limb, score end end
-- Secondary kill-condition limbs (if any) if kc.secondary then local limb, score = _find_highest_unbroken(kc.secondary) if limb and score >= P.cfg.threshold and score > candidate_score then candidate, candidate_score = limb, score end end
return candidate, candidate_score, "standard" end
function P.command_for_limb(limb) limb = tostring(limb or "") if limb == "" then return nil end return "parry " .. (_LIMB_CMD[limb] or limb) end
function P.next_command(opts) opts = opts or {} local limb, score, reason = P.evaluate() if not limb then if P._current then _p_echo("no parry needed - clearing") P._current = nil end return nil, nil, score, reason end if limb == P._current then return nil, limb, score, reason end local now = _now() local debounce = tonumber(P.cfg.route_debounce_s or 0.45) or 0.45 if debounce > 0 and P._last_sent_limb == limb and (now - tonumber(P._last_sent_at or 0)) < debounce then return nil, limb, score, reason end return P.command_for_limb(limb), limb, score, reason end
function P.note_sent(limb_or_cmd) local limb = tostring(limb_or_cmd or ""):lower() limb = limb:gsub("^parry%s+", "") limb = limb:gsub("%s+", "") if limb == "leftleg" or limb == "rightleg" or limb == "leftarm" or limb == "rightarm" or limb == "head" or limb == "torso" then P._current = limb P._last_sent_limb = limb P._last_sent_at = _now() return true end return false end
------------------------------------------------------------ -- Send the PARRY command if needed (non-route fallback) ------------------------------------------------------------
function P.update() local cmd, limb, score, reason = P.next_command({ source = "prompt" }) if not cmd then return end if type(send) == "function" then send(cmd, false) P.note_sent(limb) end _p_echo(string.format("%s (score: %d, class: %s, reason: %s)", (_LIMB_CMD[limb] or limb), score or 0, tostring(_enemy_class() or "?"), tostring(reason or "-"))) end
------------------------------------------------------------ -- Prompt-driven re-evaluation ------------------------------------------------------------
if type(registerAnonymousEventHandler) == "function" then registerAnonymousEventHandler("gmcp.Char.Vitals", function() pcall(P.update) end) end
------------------------------------------------------------ -- Runtime hooks ------------------------------------------------------------
if type(tempRegexTrigger) == "function" then if P._trigs.leg_restored then killTrigger(P._trigs.leg_restored) end P._trigs.leg_restored = tempRegexTrigger( [[^You have cured the (damagedleftleg|damagedrightleg) affliction\.$]], function() pcall(P.note_leg_restored, matches[2]) end ) end
------------------------------------------------------------ -- Reset on mode change to bash ------------------------------------------------------------
if type(registerAnonymousEventHandler) == "function" then registerAnonymousEventHandler("yso.mode.changed", function(_, old, new, reason) if new == "bash" then P._current = nil P.clear_restore("mode->bash") _p_echo("mode->bash: parry cleared") end end) end
_p_echo("Yso parry module loaded") --========================================================--

Script.name: Cleanseaura module
Script.script:
--========================================================-- -- Yso_Occultist_clock.lua (DROP-IN) [UPDATED] -- "clock" = Cleanseaura lock planner (mana route to <=39%, then CLEANSEAURA) -- -- Toggle alias: -- ^clock$ -- Yso.occ.clock.toggle() -- -- Update: Adds cleanseaura-module conditional checks: -- - if entity ready: command slime && <attack filler> -- - else: instill paralysis && <secondary filler> -- - command bubonis && <attack filler> --========================================================--
Yso = Yso or {} Yso.occ = Yso.occ or {} Yso.occ.clock = Yso.occ.clock or {}
local C = Yso.occ.clock local Q = Yso.queue
C.cfg = C.cfg or { enabled = false,
-- thresholds enervate_start = 60, -- start ENERVATE at or below this mana% cleanse_at = 39, -- trigger CLEANSEAURA at or below this mana%
-- stability / lock rules lock_stable_count = 3, -- focus-lock affs count threshold
-- route selection (separate planners; no auto-pivot) route = "aff", -- "aff" | "lim" lim_affs_for_aeon = 5, lim_require_speed_strip = true, lim_pinchaura_order = { "speed", "caloric" }, lim_bodywarp_lesser = "regress", lim_speed_strip_hold_s = 2.5, lim_entity_priority = { "worm", "sycophant", "storm", "slime", "humbug", "bubonis", "crone", "firelord", "hound", "bloodleech" }, lim_worm_duration_s = 20, lim_worm_refresh_lead_s = 1.0, lim_sycophant_duration_s = 30, lim_sycophant_refresh_lead_s = 1.0,
-- throttles min_send_interval = 0.25, dedupe_window = 0.90, -- cleanseaura spam guard cleansed_ttl = 60, cleanse_gcd = 6.0,
-- phase 2 (truename): after CLEANSEAURA success, command abomination once, then optionally auto-disable abom_phase2 = true, abom_require_up = true, -- require Yso.dom.abomination_up() == true abom_require_eq = true, -- only fire on an EQ-ready tick abom_gcd = 2.0, abom_auto_disable = true, abom_cmd = "command abomination at %s", clock_loyals_on_cmd = "order entourage kill %s", clock_loyals_off_cmd = "order entourage passive",
-- queues q_eq = "ec!p!w!t", q_bal = "ebc!p!w!t",
-- soft cooldowns cds = { instill = 2.20, bubonis = 2.30, slime = 2.30, -- NEW: slime command throttle humbug = 2.30, storm = 2.30, ruinate_lovers = 2.40, enervate = 4.00, pinchaura = 4.00, aeon = 3.00, shrivel = 2.20, regress = 2.50, bodywarp = 2.60, justice = 3.00, worm = 2.80, sycophant = 2.80, firelord = 2.30, hound = 2.30, bloodleech = 2.30, crone = 2.30, },
-- fillers (customize these to taste) fillers = { -- Default: enervate (if in range) else a useful instill to build kelp depth. eq_attack = nil, -- if nil, uses default picker below
-- "entity filler here" (your wording) when entity is NOT ready: -- we interpret this as "use the other lane while EQ is spent on instill paralysis". -- Default: try manaleech if missing; otherwise nothing. secondary = nil, -- if nil, uses default picker below },
echo_toggle = true, debug = false, }
C.state = C.state or { last_send_at = 0, last_sent = {}, -- payload->time last_cd = {}, -- key->time per_target = {}, -- target->table }
local function _now() return (type(getEpoch) == "function" and getEpoch()) or os.time() end
local function _trim(s) return tostring(s or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") end
local function _lc(s) return tostring(s or ""):lower() end
local function _resolve_target(arg, set) local a = _trim(arg) -- Canonical targeting: always prefer Yso.resolve_target. if type(Yso.resolve_target) == "function" then local ok,res = pcall(Yso.resolve_target, a, { set = (set == true and a ~= ""), source = "clock" }) if ok and type(res) == "string" and res ~= "" then return res end end -- Fallback: accept explicit argument, else ask Yso.get_target(). if a ~= "" then return a end if type(Yso.get_target) == "function" then local ok,res = pcall(Yso.get_target) if ok and type(res) == "string" and res ~= "" then return res end end return "" end
local function _vit_eq() if Yso and Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.is_ready)=="function" then return Yso.pulse.is_ready("eq") end local v = gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Vitals or {} return tostring(v.eq or v.equilibrium or "") == "1" end
local function _vit_bal() if Yso and Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.is_ready)=="function" then return Yso.pulse.is_ready("bal") end local v = gmcp and gmcp.Char and gmcp.Char.Vitals or {} return tostring(v.bal or v.balance or "") == "1" end
local function _entity_ready() if Yso and Yso.occ and Yso.occ.entity_ready ~= nil then return Yso.occ.entity_ready == true end return true -- if the system doesn't track it, assume true end
local function _score(aff) -- Prefer AK/Yso stable getter if present. if Yso and Yso.oc and Yso.oc.ak and type(Yso.oc.ak.get_aff_score) == "function" then local ok,v = pcall(Yso.oc.ak.get_aff_score, aff) if ok then v = tonumber(v) if v then return v end end end local s = (affstrack and affstrack.score and affstrack.score[aff]) or 0 if type(s) == "table" then if type(s.current) == "number" then s = s.current elseif type(s.score) == "number" then s = s.score else s = 0 end end return tonumber(s) or 0 end
-- "present" in AK/Yso semantics local function _has100(aff) return _score(aff) >= 100 end
local function _broken_count() local c = 0 for _, limb in ipairs({ "leftarm","rightarm","leftleg","rightleg" }) do if _score(limb) >= 100 then c = c + 1 end end return c end
local function _kelp_bucket() local T = Yso.tgt if T and T.cure_map and type(T.cure_map.kelp) == "table" then return T.cure_map.kelp end return {"asthma","clumsiness","hypochondria","sensitivity","weariness","healthleech","parasite","rebbies"} end
local function _kelp_count() local n = 0 for _, a in ipairs(_kelp_bucket()) do if _has100(a) then n = n + 1 end end return n end
local function _lock_score() if Yso and Yso.oc and Yso.oc.ak and Yso.oc.ak.scores and type(Yso.oc.ak.scores.kelp) == "function" then local ok,v = pcall(Yso.oc.ak.scores.kelp) if ok then return tonumber(v) or 0 end end if type(affstrack) == "table" then return tonumber(affstrack.kelpscore or 0) or 0 end return _kelp_count() end
local function _lock_stable() if not _has100("asthma") then return false end return _lock_score() >= (C.cfg.lock_stable_count or 3) end
local function _mana_pct(t) local T = Yso.tgt if T and type(T.get_mana_pct) == "function" then return T.get_mana_pct(t) end return nil end
local function _is_cleansed(t) if Yso.occ and type(Yso.occ.is_cleansed) == "function" then return Yso.occ.is_cleansed(t, C.cfg.cleansed_ttl or 60) == true end return false end
local function _tstate(t) local k = _lc(t) local pt = C.state.per_target pt[k] = pt[k] or { last_cleanse = 0, last_abom = 0, last_pinchaura = 0, last_speed_strip = 0, last_aeon = 0, last_justice = 0, entity_rr_idx = 1, worm_until = 0, sycophant_until = 0, lim_worm_primed = false, lim_syc_primed = false, } return pt[k] end
local function _cd_ok(key, cd) local now = _now() local last = C.state.last_cd[key] or 0 return (now - last) >= (cd or 0) end
local function _cd_mark(key) C.state.last_cd[key] = _now() end
local function _can_send(payload) local now = _now() local min_int = C.cfg.min_send_interval or 0.25 local ded_win = C.cfg.dedupe_window or 0.90 if (now - (C.state.last_send_at or 0)) < min_int then return false end local last = C.state.last_sent[payload] or 0 if (now - last) < ded_win then return false end return true end
local function _mark_sent(payload) local now = _now() C.state.last_send_at = now C.state.last_sent[payload] = now end
local function _send_addclear(qtype, payload) payload = _trim(payload) if payload == "" then return false end if not _can_send(payload) then return false end if Yso and Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.queue)=="function" then local prefer = (tostring(qtype or ""):lower() == "bal") and "bal" or "eq" Yso.pulse.queue(payload, { prefer = prefer }) _mark_sent(payload) if C.cfg.debug then cecho(string.format("<gray>[clock] SEND[pulse]: %s\n", payload)) end return true end if not (Q and type(Q.addclear) == "function") then return false end Q.addclear(qtype, payload) _mark_sent(payload) if C.cfg.debug then cecho(string.format("<gray>[clock] SEND[%s]: %s\n", qtype, payload)) end return true end
local function _send_addclearfull(qtype, payload) if not (Q and type(Q.addclearfull) == "function") then return false end payload = _trim(payload) if payload == "" then return false end if not _can_send(payload) then return false end Q.addclearfull(qtype, payload) _mark_sent(payload) if C.cfg.debug then cecho(string.format("<gray>[clock] ADDCLEARFULL[%s]: %s\n", qtype, payload)) end return true end
--======================================== -- Readaura (COMBO mode) -- readaura <t> && <attack> && <entity> -- readaura <t> && <entity> --======================================== local function _ra_ready() if Yso and Yso.occ and type(Yso.occ.readaura_is_ready) == "function" then local ok,res = pcall(Yso.occ.readaura_is_ready) if ok then return res == true end end return (Yso and Yso.occ and Yso.occ.readaura_ready ~= false) or false end
local function _prefix_readaura(t, payload, sep) payload = _trim(payload or "") if payload == "" then return payload end if payload:match("^%s*[rR][eE][aA][dD][aA][uU][rR][aA]%s") then return payload end
if _ra_ready() then if Yso and Yso.occ and type(Yso.occ.set_readaura_ready) == "function" then pcall(Yso.occ.set_readaura_ready, false, "clock_prefix") elseif Yso and Yso.occ then Yso.occ.readaura_ready = false end return ("readaura %s%s%s"):format(t, (sep or (Yso.sep or "&&")), payload) end return payload end
-- Conservative AEON gate -- Limb route: require N support affs + speed stripped -- Aff route: stable asthma+manaleech + (slick+addict OR frozen OR 1 limb OR anorexia) local function _aeon_gate(t) if not _has100("manaleech") then return false end if _route_is_limb() then if _limb_support_count() < (tonumber(C.cfg.lim_affs_for_aeon or 5) or 5) then return false end if C.cfg.lim_require_speed_strip and _aura_up(t, "speed") then return false end return true end if not _lock_stable() then return false end local slick_add = (_has100("slickness") and _has100("addiction")) local frozen = _has100("frozen") local limb1 = (_broken_count() >= 1) local anorex = _has100("anorexia") return (slick_add or frozen or limb1 or anorex) end
-- Default "attack filler here" (EQ lane) local function _default_eq_attack_filler(tgt, mana) -- Prefer enervate once in range and not already at cleanse threshold. if type(mana) == "number" and mana <= (C.cfg.enervate_start or 60) and mana > (C.cfg.cleanse_at or 39) then if _cd_ok("enervate", C.cfg.cds.enervate) then _cd_mark("enervate") return ("enervate %s"):format(tgt) end end
-- Otherwise, build kelp depth / justice fuel cheaply. if _cd_ok("instill", C.cfg.cds.instill) then local want = (not _has100("clumsiness") and "clumsiness") or (not _has100("sensitivity") and "sensitivity") or (not _has100("healthleech") and "healthleech") or (not _has100("weariness") and "weariness") if want then _cd_mark("instill") return ("instill %s with %s"):format(tgt, want) end end
return "" end
-- Default "secondary filler" when entity is DOWN and EQ is spent on instill paralysis local function _default_secondary_filler(tgt, mana) -- Safest: only add a BAL action that supports the route. if (not _has100("manaleech")) and _cd_ok("ruinate_lovers", C.cfg.cds.ruinate_lovers) and _lock_stable() then _cd_mark("ruinate_lovers") return ("ruinate lovers at %s"):format(tgt) end return "" end
local function _eq_filler(tgt, mana) if type(C.cfg.fillers.eq_attack) == "function" then local ok,res = pcall(C.cfg.fillers.eq_attack, tgt, mana) if ok and type(res) == "string" then return _trim(res) end end return _default_eq_attack_filler(tgt, mana) end
local function _secondary_filler(tgt, mana) if type(C.cfg.fillers.secondary) == "function" then local ok,res = pcall(C.cfg.fillers.secondary, tgt, mana) if ok and type(res) == "string" then return _trim(res) end end return _default_secondary_filler(tgt, mana) end
--========================================================-- -- Limb-route helpers --========================================================--
local function _route_is_limb() return (C.cfg.route or "aff") == "lim" end
local function _title_name(s) s = tostring(s or "") return s:sub(1,1):upper() .. s:sub(2):lower() end
local function _lb_hits(t, limb) if type(lb) == "table" and type(lb.getHits) == "function" then local ok,v = pcall(lb.getHits, _title_name(t), limb) if ok and type(v) == "number" then return v end end if type(lb) == "table" and type(lb.targets) == "table" then local e = lb.targets[_title_name(t)] if e and type(e[limb]) == "table" then return tonumber(e[limb].hits) or 0 end end return 0 end
local function _pick_limb_target(t) local ll = _lb_hits(t, "leftleg") local rl = _lb_hits(t, "rightleg") local la = _lb_hits(t, "leftarm") local ra = _lb_hits(t, "rightarm") if ll >= rl then return "left leg" end if rl > ll then return "right leg" end if la >= ra then return "left arm" end return "right arm" end
local function _other_leg(limb) if limb == "left leg" then return "right leg" end return "left leg" end
local function _limb_support_count() local c = 0 for _, a in ipairs({"asthma","slickness","paralysis","anorexia","frozen"}) do if _has100(a) then c = c + 1 end end return c end
local function _mark_entity_window(ts, ent) local dur = (ent == "worm" and (C.cfg.lim_worm_duration_s or 20)) or (ent == "sycophant" and (C.cfg.lim_sycophant_duration_s or 30)) or 0 ts[ent .. "_until"] = _now() + dur end
local function _entity_window_allows(ts, ent) local t_end = ts[ent .. "_until"] or 0 local lead = (ent == "worm" and (C.cfg.lim_worm_refresh_lead_s or 1)) or (ent == "sycophant" and (C.cfg.lim_sycophant_refresh_lead_s or 1)) or 0 return _now() >= (t_end - lead) end
local function _entity_cmd(ent, t, limb) if ent == "crone" then return ("command crone at %s %s"):format(t, limb or "left leg") end return ("command %s at %s"):format(ent, t) end
local function _next_limb_entity(ts, t, limb, blocked_ent) local prio = C.cfg.lim_entity_priority or {} for _, ent in ipairs(prio) do if ent ~= blocked_ent then local last = C.state.last_cd[ent] or 0 local cd = (C.cfg.cds and C.cfg.cds[ent]) or 2.30 if (_now() - last) >= cd then C.state.last_cd[ent] = _now() return _entity_cmd(ent, t, limb) end end end return nil end
local function _append_limb_entity(payload, ts, t, limb, sep, blocked_ent) if not _entity_ready() then return payload end local cmd = _next_limb_entity(ts, t, limb, blocked_ent) if cmd then return payload .. sep .. cmd end return payload end
local function _aura_up(t, def) if def == "speed" and type(Yso.speed) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(Yso.speed, t) return ok and v == true end if def == "caloric" and type(Yso.caloric) == "function" then local ok, v = pcall(Yso.caloric, t) return ok and v == true end return false end
local function _next_pinchaura_def(t, order) for _, d in ipairs(order or {"speed","caloric"}) do if _aura_up(t, d) then return d end end return nil end
local function _set_loyals_attack_state(state) if type(Yso.set_loyals_attack) == "function" then pcall(Yso.set_loyals_attack, state) elseif Yso then Yso.loyals_hostile = state end end
local function _clock_loyals_on(t) local cmd = (C.cfg.clock_loyals_on_cmd or "order entourage kill %s"):format(t) send(cmd) _set_loyals_attack_state(true) if C.cfg.debug and cecho then cecho(("<gray>[clock] loyals ON: %s\n"):format(cmd)) end end
local function _clock_loyals_off() local cmd = C.cfg.clock_loyals_off_cmd or "order entourage passive" send(cmd) _set_loyals_attack_state(false) if C.cfg.debug and cecho then cecho(("<gray>[clock] loyals OFF: %s\n"):format(cmd)) end end
function C.plan_and_fire(t) local ts = _tstate(t) local mana = _mana_pct(t) local sep = (Yso.sep or "&&")
-- Shield gate: COMMAND gremlin is EQUILIBRIUM-based; send SOLO when shielded. -- IMPORTANT: We bypass the readaura-prefix wrappers here on purpose. if Yso and Yso.shield and type(Yso.shield.is_up) == "function" then local ok, up = pcall(Yso.shield.is_up, t) if ok and up == true then if _vit_eq() and _entity_ready() and _cd_ok("shield", 1.20) then _cd_mark("shield") return _send_addclearfull(C.cfg.q_eq, ("command gremlin at %s"):format(t)) end return false end end
-- Sender wrappers: ensure *this module* always does readaura+... local function SEND(qtype, payload) payload = _prefix_readaura(t, payload, sep) return _send_addclear(qtype, payload) end local function SENDFULL(qtype, payload) payload = _prefix_readaura(t, payload, sep) return _send_addclearfull(qtype, payload) end
local mana_known = (type(mana) == "number")
-- Phase 2: after CLEANSEAURA succeeds, command Abomination once, then optionally auto-disable. -- Uses Yso.occ.is_cleansed() + success line tracking ("A look of sudden concern..."). if C.cfg.abom_phase2 and _is_cleansed(t) then local now = _now() if (now - (ts.last_abom or 0)) >= (C.cfg.abom_gcd or 2.0) then local up_ok = true if C.cfg.abom_require_up then up_ok = (Yso.dom and type(Yso.dom.abomination_up) == "function" and Yso.dom.abomination_up()) or false end local eq_ok = true if C.cfg.abom_require_eq then eq_ok = _vit_eq() end
if up_ok and eq_ok then local tpl = C.cfg.abom_cmd or "command abomination at %s" local cmd = string.format(tpl, t) if SENDFULL("eq", cmd) then ts.last_abom = now
if C.cfg.abom_auto_disable then C.cfg.enabled = false if cecho then cecho(string.format("<dark_orchid>[Occultism] <yellow>clock OFF<reset> (abomination commanded vs %s).\n", t)) end end
return true end end end end
-- 0) CLEANSEAURA override at <= 39% mana (clear everything, fire cleanseaura) if mana_known and mana <= (C.cfg.cleanse_at or 39) then local now = _now() if not _is_cleansed(t) and (now - (ts.last_cleanse or 0)) >= (C.cfg.cleanse_gcd or 6.0) then ts.last_cleanse = now return SENDFULL("eq", "cleanseaura " .. t) end end
--======================================================== --======================================================== if _route_is_limb() then
-- Prime worm timer at engagement start if _entity_ready() then if (ts.lim_worm_primed ~= true) and _entity_window_allows(ts, "worm") and _cd_ok("worm", C.cfg.cds.worm or 2.80) then _cd_mark("worm") _mark_entity_window(ts, "worm") ts.lim_worm_primed = true local payload = ("command worm at %s"):format(t) local eqfill = _default_eq_attack_filler(t, mana) if eqfill ~= "" then payload = payload .. sep .. eqfill end return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end if (ts.lim_worm_primed == true) and (ts.lim_syc_primed ~= true) and _entity_window_allows(ts, "sycophant") and _cd_ok("sycophant", C.cfg.cds.sycophant or 2.80) then _cd_mark("sycophant") _mark_entity_window(ts, "sycophant") ts.lim_syc_primed = true local payload = ("command sycophant at %s"):format(t) local eqfill = _default_eq_attack_filler(t, mana) if eqfill ~= "" then payload = payload .. sep .. eqfill end return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end end
-- Refresh worm every 20s while offense is running if (ts.lim_worm_primed == true) and _entity_window_allows(ts, "worm") and _cd_ok("worm", C.cfg.cds.worm or 2.80) then _cd_mark("worm") _mark_entity_window(ts, "worm") local payload = ("command worm at %s"):format(t) local eqfill = _default_eq_attack_filler(t, mana) if eqfill ~= "" then payload = payload .. sep .. eqfill end return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end
-- Refresh sycophant every 30s while offense is running if (ts.lim_syc_primed == true) and _entity_window_allows(ts, "sycophant") and _cd_ok("sycophant", C.cfg.cds.sycophant or 2.80) then _cd_mark("sycophant") _mark_entity_window(ts, "sycophant") local payload = ("command sycophant at %s"):format(t) local eqfill = _default_eq_attack_filler(t, mana) if eqfill ~= "" then payload = payload .. sep .. eqfill end return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end
-- Keep speed stripped aggressively once AEON setup is near-ready. local aeon_near = (_limb_support_count() >= ((tonumber(C.cfg.lim_affs_for_aeon or 5) or 5) - 1)) if aeon_near and _aura_up(t, "speed") and _cd_ok("pinchaura", C.cfg.cds.pinchaura) then _cd_mark("pinchaura") ts.last_speed_strip = _now() return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, ("pinchaura %s speed"):format(t)) end
-- Strip speed/caloric via pinchaura before AEON pressure local pin_def = _next_pinchaura_def(t, C.cfg.lim_pinchaura_order) if pin_def and _cd_ok("pinchaura", C.cfg.cds.pinchaura) then _cd_mark("pinchaura") if pin_def == "speed" then ts.last_speed_strip = _now() end return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, ("pinchaura %s %s"):format(t, pin_def)) end
local limb = _pick_limb_target(t) if _cd_ok("bodywarp", C.cfg.cds.bodywarp or 2.60) then _cd_mark("bodywarp") local lesser = C.cfg.lim_bodywarp_lesser or "shrivel" local payload = ("bodywarp %s %s %s"):format(t, limb, lesser) payload = _append_limb_entity(payload, ts, t, limb, sep) return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end if _cd_ok("shrivel", C.cfg.cds.shrivel) then _cd_mark("shrivel") local oleg = _other_leg(limb) local payload = ("shrivel %s %s"):format(limb, t) if _entity_ready() and _cd_ok("crone", C.cfg.cds.crone or 2.30) then _cd_mark("crone") payload = payload .. sep .. ("command crone at %s %s"):format(t, oleg) end payload = _append_limb_entity(payload, ts, t, limb, sep, "crone") return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end
-- Support affs (only when limb pressure on cooldown) if (not _has100("asthma")) and _cd_ok("instill", C.cfg.cds.instill) then _cd_mark("instill") local payload = ("instill %s with asthma"):format(t) payload = _append_limb_entity(payload, ts, t, _pick_limb_target(t), sep) return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end if (not _has100("slickness")) and _entity_ready() and _cd_ok("bubonis", C.cfg.cds.bubonis) then _cd_mark("bubonis") local payload = ("command bubonis at %s"):format(t) local eqfill = _default_eq_attack_filler(t, mana) if eqfill ~= "" then payload = payload .. sep .. eqfill end return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end if (not _has100("paralysis")) then if _entity_ready() and _cd_ok("slime", C.cfg.cds.slime) then _cd_mark("slime") local payload = ("command slime at %s"):format(t) local eqfill = _default_eq_attack_filler(t, mana) if eqfill ~= "" then payload = payload .. sep .. eqfill end return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) elseif _cd_ok("instill", C.cfg.cds.instill) then _cd_mark("instill") local payload = ("instill %s with paralysis"):format(t) payload = _append_limb_entity(payload, ts, t, _pick_limb_target(t), sep) return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end end if (not _has100("anorexia")) and _cd_ok("regress", C.cfg.cds.regress or 2.50) then _cd_mark("regress") local payload = ("regress %s"):format(t) payload = _append_limb_entity(payload, ts, t, _pick_limb_target(t), sep) return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end
-- Enervate pressure (preferred over AEON for cleanse race) if mana_known and mana <= (C.cfg.enervate_start or 60) and mana > (C.cfg.cleanse_at or 39) then if _cd_ok("enervate", C.cfg.cds.enervate) then _cd_mark("enervate") local payload = ("enervate %s"):format(t) payload = _append_limb_entity(payload, ts, t, _pick_limb_target(t), sep) return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end end
-- AEON spike (after support affs + speed stripped), lower priority than Enervate if _aeon_gate(t) and (not _has100("aeon")) then local now = _now() local hold = tonumber(C.cfg.lim_speed_strip_hold_s or 2.5) or 2.5 if (not _aura_up(t, "speed")) and ((now - (ts.last_speed_strip or 0)) <= hold) and ((now - (ts.last_aeon or 0)) >= (C.cfg.cds.aeon or 3.0)) then ts.last_aeon = now local payload = ("outd aeon%sfling aeon at %s"):format(sep, t) payload = _append_limb_entity(payload, ts, t, _pick_limb_target(t), sep) return SEND(C.cfg.q_bal, payload) end end
-- Lust manaleech (low priority; only when nothing else to do) if (not _has100("manaleech")) and _cd_ok("ruinate_lovers", C.cfg.cds.ruinate_lovers) then _cd_mark("ruinate_lovers") local payload = ("ruinate lovers at %s"):format(t) return SEND(C.cfg.q_bal, payload) end
return false end -- end limb route
--======================================================== -- AFF ROUTE (original planner) --========================================================
-- 1) Establish asthma (EQ) if not _has100("asthma") and _cd_ok("instill", C.cfg.cds.instill) then _cd_mark("instill") local payload = ("instill %s with asthma"):format(t)
-- opportunistic addiction rider (entity) if ready if _entity_ready() and (not _has100("addiction")) and _cd_ok("humbug", C.cfg.cds.humbug) then _cd_mark("humbug") payload = payload .. sep .. ("command humbug at %s"):format(t) end
return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end
--======================================================== -- NEW: Paralysis/Slickness maintenance (your requested logic) --========================================================
-- A) If asthma+slickness present but paralysis missing: if _has100("asthma") and _has100("slickness") and (not _has100("paralysis")) then if _entity_ready() and _cd_ok("slime", C.cfg.cds.slime) then _cd_mark("slime") local eqfill = _eq_filler(t, mana) local payload = ("command slime at %s"):format(t) if eqfill ~= "" then payload = payload .. sep .. eqfill end return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) else -- entity NOT ready: instill paralysis && <secondary filler> if _cd_ok("instill", C.cfg.cds.instill) then _cd_mark("instill") local payload = ("instill %s with paralysis"):format(t) local sec = _secondary_filler(t, mana) if sec ~= "" then payload = payload .. sep .. sec return SEND(C.cfg.q_bal, payload) -- secondary may be BAL end return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end end end
-- B) Elseif asthma+paralysis present but slickness missing: if _has100("asthma") and _has100("paralysis") and (not _has100("slickness")) then if _entity_ready() and _cd_ok("bubonis", C.cfg.cds.bubonis) then _cd_mark("bubonis") local eqfill = _eq_filler(t, mana) local payload = ("command bubonis at %s"):format(t) if eqfill ~= "" then payload = payload .. sep .. eqfill end return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end end
--======================================================== -- Existing planner logic (kept) --========================================================
-- 2) Establish slickness via Bubonis followup once asthma exists (fallback, even without paralysis) if _has100("asthma") and (not _has100("slickness")) and _entity_ready() and _cd_ok("bubonis", C.cfg.cds.bubonis) then _cd_mark("bubonis") local payload = ("command bubonis at %s"):format(t) return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end
-- 3) Build asthma stability (bury) if needed: push additional kelp-cured affs if _has100("asthma") and (not _lock_stable()) and _cd_ok("instill", C.cfg.cds.instill) then local want = (not _has100("clumsiness") and "clumsiness") or (not _has100("sensitivity") and "sensitivity") or (not _has100("healthleech") and "healthleech") or (not _has100("weariness") and "weariness") if want then _cd_mark("instill") local payload = ("instill %s with %s"):format(t, want)
if _entity_ready() and (not _has100("addiction")) and _cd_ok("humbug", C.cfg.cds.humbug) then _cd_mark("humbug") payload = payload .. sep .. ("command humbug at %s"):format(t) end
return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end end
-- 4) Establish manaleech (BAL) if (not _has100("manaleech")) and _cd_ok("ruinate_lovers", C.cfg.cds.ruinate_lovers) and _lock_stable() then _cd_mark("ruinate_lovers") local payload = ("ruinate lovers at %s"):format(t)
if _entity_ready() and _cd_ok("bubonis", C.cfg.cds.bubonis) then _cd_mark("bubonis") payload = payload .. sep .. ("command bubonis at %s"):format(t) end
return SEND(C.cfg.q_bal, payload) end
if _lock_stable() and _has100("manaleech") and _broken_count() == 0 and _cd_ok("shrivel", C.cfg.cds.shrivel) then _cd_mark("shrivel") local payload = ("shrivel left leg %s"):format(t) .. sep .. ("command crone at %s right leg"):format(t) return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, payload) end
-- 6) Conservative AEON spike if _aeon_gate(t) and (not _has100("aeon")) then local now = _now()
if (Yso and type(Yso.speed)=="function" and Yso.speed(t) == true) and (now - (ts.last_pinchaura or 0)) >= (C.cfg.cds.pinchaura or 4.0) then ts.last_pinchaura = now _cd_mark("pinchaura") return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, ("pinchaura %s speed"):format(t)) end
if (now - (ts.last_aeon or 0)) >= (C.cfg.cds.aeon or 3.0) then ts.last_aeon = now local payload = ("outd aeon%sfling aeon at %s"):format(sep, t) if _entity_ready() and _cd_ok("bubonis", C.cfg.cds.bubonis) then _cd_mark("bubonis") payload = ("command bubonis at %s"):format(t) .. sep .. payload end return SEND(C.cfg.q_bal, payload) end end
-- 7) ENERVATE pressure at <= 60% (EQ) if mana_known and mana <= (C.cfg.enervate_start or 60) and mana > (C.cfg.cleanse_at or 39) then if _cd_ok("enervate", C.cfg.cds.enervate) then _cd_mark("enervate") return SEND(C.cfg.q_eq, ("enervate %s"):format(t)) end end
-- (left as-is here; you said you want Justice at 4+ but we are keeping this clock module minimal.) -- If we didn't send anything, do nothing (no standalone readaura).
return false end
function C.tick(arg) if not C.cfg.enabled then return false end local t = _resolve_target(arg, false) if t == "" then return false end if not (_vit_eq() or _vit_bal()) then return false end return C.plan_and_fire(t) == true end
function C.toggle(arg) C.cfg.enabled = not C.cfg.enabled if Yso and Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.wake)=="function" then Yso.pulse.wake("cleanseaura:toggle") end
local tgt = "" if C.cfg.enabled then tgt = _resolve_target(arg, true)
local ts = _tstate(tgt) ts.lim_worm_primed = false ts.lim_syc_primed = false ts.worm_until = 0 ts.sycophant_until = 0
if tgt ~= "" then _clock_loyals_on(tgt) end else tgt = _resolve_target("", false) _clock_loyals_off() end
if C.cfg.echo_toggle and cecho then if C.cfg.enabled then cecho(string.format("<dark_orchid>[Occultism] <aquamarine>clock ON<reset> vs %s (route: %s).\n", (tgt ~= "" and tgt or "?"), (C.cfg.route or "aff"))) else cecho("<dark_orchid>[Occultism] <yellow>clock OFF<reset>.\n") end end
if C.cfg.enabled then C.tick() end end
function C.firelord_ack(tgt) -- ACK hook for "Pyradius conversions" trigger ("You command your firelord ... Pyradius ..."). -- This is primarily a timestamp latch for future routing; it is safe/no-op otherwise. C.state = C.state or {} C.state.last_pyradius = (type(getEpoch) == "function" and getEpoch()) or os.time()
if C.cfg and C.cfg.debug and cecho then cecho(string.format("<gray>[clock] Pyradius ACK vs %s.\n", tostring(tgt or "?"))) end end
-- Pulse driver (replaces GMCP driver) if Yso and Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.register)=="function" then Yso.pulse.register("cleanseaura", function() if C and C.cfg and C.cfg.enabled then C.tick() end end, {order = -10}) end
--========================================================-- -- end clock module --========================================================--

Script.name: Yso.state
Script.script:
--========================================================-- -- -- Goals: -- -- Schema (high level): -- Yso.state.meta : bookkeeping (dirty, ticks, wake reasons) -- Yso.state.self : my vitals/affs/flags (aka "me") -- Yso.state.tgt : current target pointer + current target cache -- Yso.state.opp : per-opponent cache keyed by lower(name) -- Yso.state.sensors: readaura, prompt, etc -- Yso.state.queue : queue model + lane readiness mirror -- -- Compatibility: -- Yso.state.tgt aliases current target cache entry + pointer (subset) --========================================================--
Yso = Yso or {} Yso.state = Yso.state or {}
-- ---------- tiny utils ---------- local function _now() if type(getEpoch) == "function" then local t = tonumber(getEpoch()) or os.time() -- Some setups return ms; normalize to seconds-ish. if t > 20000000000 then t = t / 1000 end return t end return os.time() end
local function _shallow_copy(src) if type(src) ~= "table" then return {} end local dst = {} for k, v in pairs(src) do dst[k] = v end return dst end
local function _ensure_table(t, key) if type(t[key]) ~= "table" then t[key] = {} end return t[key] end
local function _merge_defaults(dst, defaults) for k, v in pairs(defaults or {}) do if type(v) == "table" then if type(dst[k]) ~= "table" then dst[k] = {} end _merge_defaults(dst[k], v) else if dst[k] == nil then dst[k] = v end end end end
local function _clean_name(s) s = tostring(s or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") return s end
local function _tkey(name) name = _clean_name(name):lower() -- Keep Achaea-friendly keys (letters, digits, ', - and underscore) name = name:gsub("[%s]+","_") return name end
-- ---------- defaults ---------- local DEFAULTS = { meta = { schema_ver = 1, boot_at = 0, tick_id = 0, last_tick_at = 0, last_wake_at = 0, last_wake_reason = "", last_commit_hash = "", pending_tick = false, pending_reason = "", last_update = 0, dirty = {}, -- set of dirty domains reasons = {}, -- last flush reasons (set) },
self = { name = "", vitals = {}, bal = false, eq = false, affs = { map = {}, last_update = 0 }, flags = {}, cds = {}, last_update = 0, _vitals_sig = "", },
opp = {},
sensors = { readaura = { ready = true, reason = "", mark = 0, pending = { active = false, target = "", key = "", at = 0 }, }, },
queue = { model = { total = 0, by_q = {}, full = false, last_full_ts = 0, last_update = 0 }, lanes = { eq = { ready = nil, pending = false }, bal = { ready = nil, pending = false }, class = { ready = nil, pending = false, inflight = false }, free = { ready = true, pending = false }, }, last_update = 0, },
-- ------- Spine v1 compatibility (do not remove) ------- me = { bal = false, eq = false, prone = false, stunned = false, vitals = {}, affs = {}, cds = {}, flags = {}, last_update = 0, }, tgt = { name = "", key = "", present = false, source = "", at = 0, affs = {}, defs = {}, limbs = {}, aura = {}, cds = {}, flags = {}, last_seen = 0, last_update = 0, }, }
local function _ensure_opp(key, name) if key == "" then return nil end local opp = _ensure_table(Yso.state, "opp") if type(opp[key]) ~= "table" then opp[key] = { name = _clean_name(name or key), key = key, last_seen = 0, last_update = 0, affs = { known = {}, last_update = 0 }, tracking = { prone = { val = nil, at = 0, src = "" } }, aura = { last = {}, last_update = 0 }, cds = {}, flags = {}, } end return opp[key] end
-- ---------- init ---------- function Yso.state.init() _merge_defaults(Yso.state, DEFAULTS) rawset(Yso.state, "target", nil)
if (Yso.state.meta.boot_at or 0) == 0 then Yso.state.meta.boot_at = _now() end Yso.state.meta.last_update = Yso.state.meta.last_update or _now()
Yso.state.tgt = Yso.state.tgt or {} local tgt = Yso.state.tgt local tname = _clean_name(tgt.name) if tname ~= "" then local key = _tkey(tname) tgt.key = key local o = _ensure_opp(key, tname) if o then o.last_seen = _now() o.last_update = _now() end else tgt.key = "" end
return Yso.state end
-- ---------- compatibility mirrors ---------- local function _mirror_self_to_me() local s, me = Yso.state.self, Yso.state.me if type(s) ~= "table" or type(me) ~= "table" then return end me.bal = s.bal me.eq = s.eq me.vitals = _shallow_copy(s.vitals) me.last_update = s.last_update or me.last_update end
local function _normalize_tgt_state() local tgt = Yso.state.tgt if type(tgt) ~= "table" then return end tgt.name = _clean_name(tgt.name) if tgt.name == "" then tgt.key = "" if tgt.present == nil then tgt.present = false end return end if _clean_name(tgt.key) == "" then tgt.key = _tkey(tgt.name) end if tgt.present == nil then tgt.present = true end end
-- ---------- API ---------- function Yso.state.reset_target(newname, source) Yso.state.init() newname = _clean_name(newname) source = _clean_name(source) local ts = _now()
local tgt = Yso.state.tgt tgt.name = newname tgt.key = _tkey(newname) tgt.present = (newname ~= "") tgt.source = (source ~= "" and source or tgt.source or "") tgt.at = ts
tgt.affs, tgt.defs, tgt.limbs, tgt.aura, tgt.cds, tgt.flags = {}, {}, {}, {}, {}, {} tgt.last_seen, tgt.last_update = ts, ts
if newname ~= "" then local o = _ensure_opp(tgt.key, newname) if o then o.last_seen, o.last_update = ts, ts end end
Yso.state.meta.last_commit_hash = "" Yso.state.meta.last_update = ts
_normalize_tgt_state() return Yso.state.tgt end
function Yso.state.set_target_present(is_present) Yso.state.init() local ts = _now() local on = (is_present == true) local tgt = Yso.state.tgt
tgt.present = on tgt.last_update = ts if on then tgt.at = ts local key = tgt.key or "" local o = _ensure_opp(key, tgt.name or key) if o then o.last_seen, o.last_update = ts, ts end tgt.last_seen = ts end
Yso.state.meta.last_update = ts
return on end
function Yso.state.set_vitals(pkt) Yso.state.init() pkt = pkt or {}
local bal_raw = pkt.bal; if bal_raw == nil then bal_raw = pkt.balance end local eq_raw = pkt.eq; if eq_raw == nil then eq_raw = pkt.equilibrium end
local bal = (tostring(bal_raw or "") == "1" or bal_raw == true) local eq = (tostring(eq_raw or "") == "1" or eq_raw == true)
local ts = _now() local self = Yso.state.self self.bal = bal self.eq = eq self.vitals = _shallow_copy(pkt) self.last_update = ts
-- legacy mirror local me = Yso.state.me me.bal = bal me.eq = eq me.vitals = _shallow_copy(pkt) me.last_update = ts
Yso.state.meta.last_update = ts return self end
function Yso.state.set_flag(side, key, value) Yso.state.init() side = tostring(side or ""):lower() key = tostring(key or "") local ts = _now()
if side == "tgt" or side == "target" then _ensure_table(Yso.state.tgt, "flags")[key] = value Yso.state.tgt.last_update = ts else _ensure_table(Yso.state.me, "flags")[key] = value _ensure_table(Yso.state.self, "flags")[key] = value Yso.state.me.last_update = ts end Yso.state.meta.last_update = ts return value end
function Yso.state.snapshot() Yso.state.init() _mirror_self_to_me() _normalize_tgt_state() return { meta = _shallow_copy(Yso.state.meta), self = _shallow_copy(Yso.state.self), queue = _shallow_copy(Yso.state.queue), me = _shallow_copy(Yso.state.me), tgt = _shallow_copy(Yso.state.tgt), ts = _now(), } end
-- bootstrap defaults Yso.state.init()
--========================================================--

Script.name: Yso.state wiring
Yso ingest
Script.script:
--========================================================-- -- -- Design: -- -- Back-compat: --========================================================--
Yso = Yso or {} Yso.ingest = Yso.ingest or {} Yso.state = Yso.state or {}
local I = Yso.ingest
local function _now() if type(getEpoch) == "function" then local t = tonumber(getEpoch()) or os.time() if t > 20000000000 then t = t / 1000 end return t end return os.time() end
local function _clean(s) return (tostring(s or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","")) end
local function _tkey(name) name = _clean(name):lower():gsub("[%s]+","_") return name end
local function _normalize_aff(a) if type(a) == "table" then a = a.name or a.affliction or a.id end a = tostring(a or "") a = a:gsub("[%.,;:!%?]+$", ""):gsub("[%s%-]+","_"):lower() return (a ~= "" and a) or nil end
local function _dirty(key) if Yso.engine and type(Yso.engine.mark_dirty) == "function" then Yso.engine.mark_dirty(key) else Yso.state.meta = Yso.state.meta or {} Yso.state.meta.dirty = Yso.state.meta.dirty or {} Yso.state.meta.dirty[key] = true end end
local function _wake(reason, dirty_key) if Yso.engine and type(Yso.engine.wake) == "function" then Yso.engine.wake(reason, dirty_key) elseif Yso.pulse and type(Yso.pulse.wake) == "function" then if dirty_key then _dirty(dirty_key) end Yso.pulse.wake(reason) end end
local function _ensure() if Yso.state and type(Yso.state.init) == "function" then Yso.state.init() else Yso.state.self = Yso.state.self or { vitals = {}, affs = { map = {} }, flags = {} } Yso.state.me = Yso.state.me or { vitals = {}, affs = {}, flags = {} } Yso.state.tgt = Yso.state.tgt or { name = "", key = "", present = false, source = "", at = 0, affs = {}, defs = {}, limbs = {}, aura = {}, flags = {} } rawset(Yso.state, "target", nil) Yso.state.opp = Yso.state.opp or {} Yso.state.meta = Yso.state.meta or { dirty = {} } end end
-- ---------------- vitals ---------------- function I.vitals(pkt, src) _ensure() pkt = pkt or {} src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "gmcp" end
local self = Yso.state.self or {} local prev = tostring(self._vitals_sig or "")
local bal_raw = pkt.bal; if bal_raw == nil then bal_raw = pkt.balance end local eq_raw = pkt.eq; if eq_raw == nil then eq_raw = pkt.equilibrium end
local bal = (tostring(bal_raw or "") == "1" or bal_raw == true) local eq = (tostring(eq_raw or "") == "1" or eq_raw == true)
local hp = tostring(pkt.hp or "") local mp = tostring(pkt.mp or "") local ep = tostring(pkt.ep or "") local wp = tostring(pkt.wp or "") local nl = tostring(pkt.nl or "")
local sig = table.concat({eq and "1" or "0", bal and "1" or "0", hp, mp, ep, wp, nl}, "|")
-- Always update state (cheap); wake only when signature changes if type(Yso.state.set_vitals) == "function" then Yso.state.set_vitals(pkt) else Yso.state.self = Yso.state.self or {} Yso.state.self.bal, Yso.state.self.eq = bal, eq Yso.state.self.vitals = pkt Yso.state.me = Yso.state.me or {} Yso.state.me.bal, Yso.state.me.eq = bal, eq Yso.state.me.vitals = pkt end
Yso.state.self._vitals_sig = sig
if sig ~= prev then _dirty("vitals") _wake("vitals:"..src) end end
-- ---------------- target ---------------- function I.target_set(name, source, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} name = _clean(name) source = _clean(source); if source == "" then source = "unknown" end if name == "" then return false end
local cur = _clean((Yso.state.tgt and Yso.state.tgt.name) or "") if cur:lower() == name:lower() and (Yso.state.tgt and Yso.state.tgt.present) then return true end
if type(Yso.state.reset_target) == "function" then Yso.state.reset_target(name, source) else Yso.state.tgt = Yso.state.tgt or {} Yso.state.tgt.name, Yso.state.tgt.key = name, _tkey(name) Yso.state.tgt.present, Yso.state.tgt.source = true, source Yso.state.tgt.at = _now() Yso.state.tgt.last_seen, Yso.state.tgt.last_update = Yso.state.tgt.at, Yso.state.tgt.at end
_dirty("target") if not opts.nowake then _wake("target:set:"..source) end return true end
function I.target_left(reason, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} reason = _clean(reason); if reason == "" then reason = "left" end
if type(Yso.state.set_target_present) == "function" then Yso.state.set_target_present(false) else if Yso.state.tgt then Yso.state.tgt.present = false Yso.state.tgt.last_update = _now() end end
_dirty("target") if not opts.nowake then _wake("target:left:"..reason) end return true end
-- ---------------- self affs ---------------- function I.aff_gain(side, aff, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} side = tostring(side or "me"):lower() src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "unknown" end aff = _normalize_aff(aff) if not aff then return end
local ts = _now()
if side == "tgt" or side == "target" then Yso.state.tgt = Yso.state.tgt or {}; Yso.state.tgt.affs = Yso.state.tgt.affs or {} Yso.state.tgt.affs[aff] = true Yso.state.tgt.last_update = ts _dirty("tgt_affs") else Yso.state.self = Yso.state.self or {}; Yso.state.self.affs = Yso.state.self.affs or { map = {} } Yso.state.self.affs.map = Yso.state.self.affs.map or {} Yso.state.self.affs.map[aff] = true Yso.state.self.affs.last_update = ts
Yso.state.me = Yso.state.me or {}; Yso.state.me.affs = Yso.state.me.affs or {} Yso.state.me.affs[aff] = true Yso.state.me.last_update = ts _dirty("affs") end
if not opts.nowake then _wake("aff_gain:"..side..":"..src) end end
function I.aff_cure(side, aff, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} side = tostring(side or "me"):lower() src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "unknown" end aff = _normalize_aff(aff) if not aff then return end
local ts = _now()
if side == "tgt" or side == "target" then Yso.state.tgt = Yso.state.tgt or {}; Yso.state.tgt.affs = Yso.state.tgt.affs or {} Yso.state.tgt.affs[aff] = nil Yso.state.tgt.last_update = ts _dirty("tgt_affs") else if Yso.state.self and Yso.state.self.affs and Yso.state.self.affs.map then Yso.state.self.affs.map[aff] = nil Yso.state.self.affs.last_update = ts end if Yso.state.me and Yso.state.me.affs then Yso.state.me.affs[aff] = nil Yso.state.me.last_update = ts end _dirty("affs") end
if not opts.nowake then _wake("aff_cure:"..side..":"..src) end end
function I.aff_sync(side, map, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} side = tostring(side or "me"):lower() src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "sync" end if type(map) ~= "table" then return end
local ts = _now()
if side == "tgt" or side == "target" then Yso.state.tgt = Yso.state.tgt or {}; Yso.state.tgt.affs = {} for a,_ in pairs(map) do if a then Yso.state.tgt.affs[tostring(a)] = true end end Yso.state.tgt.last_update = ts _dirty("tgt_affs") else Yso.state.self = Yso.state.self or {}; Yso.state.self.affs = Yso.state.self.affs or { map = {} } Yso.state.self.affs.map = {} for a,_ in pairs(map) do if a then Yso.state.self.affs.map[tostring(a)] = true end end Yso.state.self.affs.last_update = ts
Yso.state.me = Yso.state.me or {}; Yso.state.me.affs = {} for a,_ in pairs(map) do if a then Yso.state.me.affs[tostring(a)] = true end end Yso.state.me.last_update = ts _dirty("affs") end
if not opts.nowake then _wake("aff_sync:"..side..":"..src) end end
-- ---------------- queue list parser ---------------- function I.queue_list(model, rows, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "queue_list" end if type(model) ~= "table" then return end
local ts = _now()
Yso.state.queue = Yso.state.queue or {} Yso.state.queue.model = Yso.state.queue.model or {} for k,v in pairs(model) do Yso.state.queue.model[k] = v end Yso.state.queue.model.last_update = ts Yso.state.queue.last_update = ts
-- Optional: store last parsed rows (debug only; can be heavy) if opts.store_rows and type(rows) == "table" then Yso.state.queue.last_rows = rows end
_dirty("queue") if not opts.nowake then _wake("queue:list:"..src) end end
-- ---------------- readaura ---------------- function I.readaura_ready(val, reason, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} local r = (val == true) reason = _clean(reason) src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "readaura" end
Yso.state.sensors = Yso.state.sensors or {} Yso.state.sensors.readaura = Yso.state.sensors.readaura or { pending = {} } local RA = Yso.state.sensors.readaura RA.ready = r RA.reason = reason RA.mark = _now()
_dirty("readaura") if not opts.nowake then _wake("readaura:"..(r and "ready" or "down")..":"..src) end return r end
function I.readaura_begin(tgt, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} tgt = _clean(tgt); if tgt == "" then return false end src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "begin" end
Yso.state.sensors = Yso.state.sensors or {} Yso.state.sensors.readaura = Yso.state.sensors.readaura or { pending = {} } local RA = Yso.state.sensors.readaura RA.pending = RA.pending or {} RA.pending.active = true RA.pending.target = tgt RA.pending.key = _tkey(tgt) RA.pending.at = _now()
_dirty("readaura") if not opts.nowake then _wake("readaura:begin:"..src) end return true end
function I.readaura_result(tgt, phys, ment, flags, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} tgt = _clean(tgt); if tgt == "" then return false end src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "finalize" end
local key = _tkey(tgt) Yso.state.opp = Yso.state.opp or {} if type(Yso.state.opp[key]) ~= "table" then Yso.state.opp[key] = { name = tgt, key = key, aura = { last = {} } } end
local o = Yso.state.opp[key] o.name = tgt o.key = key o.aura = o.aura or { last = {} } o.aura.last = o.aura.last or {}
o.aura.last.ts = _now() o.aura.last.physical = tonumber(phys) or 0 o.aura.last.mental = tonumber(ment) or 0 if type(flags) == "table" then for k,v in pairs(flags) do o.aura.last[tostring(k)] = (v == true) end end o.aura.last_update = o.aura.last.ts o.last_update = o.aura.last.ts o.last_seen = o.aura.last.ts
-- if this is current target, mirror into Spine v1 tgt.aura local curk = (Yso.state.tgt and Yso.state.tgt.key) or "" if curk == "" then curk = _tkey((Yso.state.tgt and Yso.state.tgt.name) or "") end if curk ~= "" and curk == key and Yso.state.tgt then Yso.state.tgt.aura = Yso.state.tgt.aura or {} Yso.state.tgt.aura.last = o.aura.last Yso.state.tgt.last_update = o.aura.last.ts end
-- close pending if Yso.state.sensors and Yso.state.sensors.readaura and Yso.state.sensors.readaura.pending then Yso.state.sensors.readaura.pending.active = false end
_dirty("readaura") if not opts.nowake then _wake("readaura:result:"..src) end return true end
-- ---------------- opponent tracking (AK hooks) ---------------- function I.opp_prone(tgt, is_prone, src, opts) _ensure() opts = opts or {} tgt = _clean(tgt); if tgt == "" then return false end src = _clean(src); if src == "" then src = "prone" end
local key = _tkey(tgt) Yso.state.opp = Yso.state.opp or {} if type(Yso.state.opp[key]) ~= "table" then Yso.state.opp[key] = { name = tgt, key = key, tracking = { prone = {} } } end local o = Yso.state.opp[key] o.tracking = o.tracking or {} o.tracking.prone = o.tracking.prone or {} o.tracking.prone.val = (is_prone == true) o.tracking.prone.at = _now() o.tracking.prone.src = src o.last_update = o.tracking.prone.at o.last_seen = o.tracking.prone.at
-- mirror into current target affs if this matches current target local curk = (Yso.state.tgt and Yso.state.tgt.key) or "" if curk == "" then curk = _tkey((Yso.state.tgt and Yso.state.tgt.name) or "") end if curk ~= "" and curk == key then Yso.state.tgt = Yso.state.tgt or {}; Yso.state.tgt.affs = Yso.state.tgt.affs or {} if is_prone == true then Yso.state.tgt.affs.prone = true else Yso.state.tgt.affs.prone = nil end Yso.state.tgt.last_update = _now() _dirty("tgt_affs") end
_dirty("opp") if not opts.nowake then _wake("opp:prone:"..src) end return true end
-- ---------------- optional: hook existing aff pipeline ---------------- I._hooked = I._hooked or false function I.hook_aff_pipeline() if I._hooked then return end if type(Yso.aff_gain) ~= "function" or type(Yso.aff_cure) ~= "function" then return end
I._orig_aff_gain = I._orig_aff_gain or Yso.aff_gain I._orig_aff_cure = I._orig_aff_cure or Yso.aff_cure
Yso.aff_gain = function(a, ...) local r1, r2, r3 = I._orig_aff_gain(a, ...) I.aff_gain("me", a, "aff_gain_wrap", { nowake = true }) return r1, r2, r3 end
Yso.aff_cure = function(a, ...) local r1, r2, r3 = I._orig_aff_cure(a, ...) I.aff_cure("me", a, "aff_cure_wrap", { nowake = true }) return r1, r2, r3 end
